completed_tasks.name: Zero-coordinate factoring: deconvolution works perfectly at small scale (10^5). Each zero gives independent integer test.
FFT factoring: DEAD. Factors rank 30000/65536. No spectral peaks at factor locations. 9-360x slower than trial division.
Seeded ZERO_COORDINATE_SEED.md into primefinder project. Other session tested it -- doesn't scale to RSA-100 (needs O(q) zeros).
Fractal analysis of Schur gap: NOT fractal. Box dim 0.55, power spectrum f^{-2.2} (smooth). Gap is a well-behaved function.
Fractal analysis of zero spacings: anti-persistent (H=0.33, GUE level repulsion), weakly multifractal (dh=0.11). Not a proof path.
Dickman function correlation: 0.994 but spurious (exponent 0.07, no better than simple exponential). Smooth number density doesn't reach eigenvalues.
25 Turan ratios at 100-digit precision. R_k ~ 1 + 1.127/k^{0.93}. All pass. Zeta boost 1.04-1.43x above Hermite baseline.

remaining_tasks.name: Holtz email pending. Paper at docs/cauchy_matrix_conjecture.pdf (v4, 5pp).
Prove exponential decay margin ~ exp(-0.057L) for all L. THE gap.
Awaiting user direction. All computational angles explored.

next_action: Awaiting user. All explorations from Session 81 killed or catalogued. Zero-coordinate factoring doesn't scale. Fractals don't help. Dickman doesn't reach. The proof gap remains: prove the margin stays positive for all L.
